abstracts.value: We uncover an effective and communicative set of agents working with MadGraph. Agentic installation, learning-by-doing training, and user support provide easy access to state-of-the-art simulations and accelerate LHC research. We show in detail how MadAgents interact with inexperienced and advanced users, support a range of simulation tasks, and analyze results. In a second step, we illustrate how MadAgents automatize event generation and run an autonomous simulation campaign, starting from a pdf file of a paper.
